message:
fix(manifest): preserve cycle order in error messages

Bug: Array.sort() was mutating cyclePath in place, causing cycle
detection errors to show modules in alphabetical order instead of
actual dependency order.

Fix: Use [...cyclePath].sort() to create a copy for deduplication key.

Added test: 'preserves cycle order in error message (not alphabetized)'
verifies that cycle path follows actual dependency chain.

Also excluded test files from tsconfig to avoid bun:test type errors.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
